title: Verilator doesn't compile with flex 2.6.4 but does with 2.5.37
body:
Hi there,

I'm trying to compile the v4.106 tag in order to get cocotb working and am hitting a compilation error in V3Lexer.  This seems to be due to the flex version and having recently installed the latest flex version, it prevents Verilator compilation.  I know this might well fall under the "it's a problem with your system" banner but wanted to see if you had any input. What version of flex do you recommend.  Your prerequisites don't say anything about flex versions.

I'm on a RHE7.9 machine with GCC 9.3.0.

```
make[2]: Entering directory `/proj/tigris/tools/src/verilator/src/obj_dbg'
      Compile flags:  g++ -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -ggdb -DVL_DEBUG -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG -MP -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR="" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT="/proj/tigris/tools/verilator/v4.106/share/verilator"
g++   -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -ggdb -DVL_DEBUG -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG -MP  -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR=\"\" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT=\"/proj/tigris/tools/verilator/v4.106/share/verilator\" -Wno-char-subscripts -Wno-unused -c ../V3ParseLex.cpp -o V3ParseLex.o
In file included from ../V3ParseLex.cpp:28:
V3Lexer_pregen.yy.cpp: In member function ‘virtual int V3LexerBase::yylex()’:
V3Lexer_pregen.yy.cpp:4243:9: error: request for member ‘rdbuf’ in ‘((V3LexerBase*)this)->V3LexerBase::yyin’, which is of pointer type ‘std::istream*’ {aka ‘std::basic_istream<char>*’} (maybe you meant to use ‘->’ ?)
 4243 |    yyin.rdbuf(std::cin.rdbuf());
      |         ^~~~~
```
